description: Supplemental assets for crouching low punch and crouching low kick. These replace the visual reuse of standing low attacks when the player is already crouching.

features.crouch_punch_low: low punch launched from crouch, not from standing posture
features.crouch_kick_low: low sweep kick launched from crouch, not from standing posture

integration_rule: if fighter.is_crouching and attack.kind in {'punch','kick'} and attack.height == 'low': use crouch_<kind>_low animation
